title: Sharing Insights on Economic Growth With Olalekan Ajayi of CBN - FinancialEDGE

html:
The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) hosted the 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar in Abuja.

The event’s theme was “Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy.”

Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director at Financial Edge, and Olalekan Ajayi, Head of Media Relations at the CBN, were among the key stakeholders in attendance.

The seminar provided a platform for industry experts to discuss the role of banking recapitalization in driving Nigeria’s economic growth and achieving its ambitious goal of becoming a one-trillion-dollar economy.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge and Olalekan Ajayi Head of Media Relations Central Bank Of Nigeria (CBN) at the 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar in Abuja, with the theme: “Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy.
